hero.eyebrow: Crochet Creations · Made in Small Batches
hero.headline: Hi, I'm
hero.name: Xena
hero.copy: Hand-crocheted softies, accessories & keepsakes — each one made one stitch at a time from my little corner of the world. Pick a piece from the gallery, or dream up something just for you.

about.heading: Yarn, tea, and a whole lot of heart.
about.p1: I started crocheting on a rainy afternoon, and somehow never put the hook down. What began as a hobby turned into a tiny studio of softies, scrunchies, and keepsakes — every piece designed slowly, by hand, in pastel palettes I can't help but reach for.
about.p2: If you find something here that makes you smile, that's exactly the idea. ♡

gallery.heading: Made with Love
gallery.sub: A little gallery of finished pieces. Snapshots from the studio, the desk, and the windowsill.

custom.copy: Got something specific in mind? A bear in your best friend's favourite colour, a baby blanket for a new arrival, a matching scrunchie set? Tell me about it below and I'll get back to you with a sketch & quote within a few days.
custom.checklist1: Plushies, hats, bags, scrunchies, blankets — bring your idea.
custom.checklist2: I'll send a little sketch + colour palette before stitching.
custom.checklist3: Most pieces ship in 2–4 weeks (it's all by hand!).
custom.name: Your name
custom.ideaPh: A little bear that looks like my dog Mochi…
custom.successHeading: Yay, your note is on its way!
custom.successCopy: I'll write back within 2–3 days with a little sketch & quote. Until then, thank you so much for thinking of me. ♡
custom.errorConfig: Email is not configured yet. Please try again later.
custom.errorSend: We couldn't send your note — please try again.

footer.tag: Homemade with love · Crochet creations from a little corner of the world.
footer.copyright: © 2026 XO Xena · Made by hand, sent with love.
